title: leucas menthifolia var. cephalantha
intro: Leucas menthifolia var. cephalantha, also known as Ceylonese mint or Ceylon leucas, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Leucas menthifolia var. cephalantha include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Leucas menthifolia var. cephalantha can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to alleviate cold and flu symptoms, as well as digestive issues.
